recommendations.title: Wild Horses
recommendations.overview: Texas Ranger Samantha Payne reopens a 15-year-old missing person case, and uncovers evidence that suggests that the boy was likely murdered on a ranch belonging to wealthy family man, Scott Briggs. When Scott’s estranged son unexpectedly returns home

recommendations.title: Falling Down
recommendations.overview: An ordinary man frustrated with the various flaws he sees in society begins to psychotically and violently lash out against them.

recommendations.title: Sling Blade
recommendations.overview: Karl Childers, a mentally disabled man, has been in the custody of the state mental hospital since the age of 12 for killing his mother and her lover. Although thoroughly institutionalized, he is deemed fit to be released into the outside world.

recommendations.title: Apocalypse Now
recommendations.overview: At the height of the Vietnam war, Captain Benjamin Willard is sent on a dangerous mission that, officially, "does not exist, nor will it ever exist." His goal is to locate - and eliminate - a mysterious Green Beret Colonel named Walter Kurtz, who has

recommendations.title: The Godfather Trilogy: 1901-1980
recommendations.overview: Following the release of The Godfather Part III in 1990, Coppola, Barry Malkin, and Walter Murch edited the three Godfather movies into chronological order. As had the earlier compilations, this film incorporated scenes that are not part of the theat

recommendations.title: Tender Mercies
recommendations.overview: Alcoholic former country singer Mac Sledge makes friends with a young widow and her son. The friendship enables him to find inspiration to resume his career.

recommendations.title: The Gingerbread Man
recommendations.overview: A successful Savannah defense attorney gets romantically involved with a sexy, mysterious waitress troubled by psychopaths and dark family secrets.

recommendations.title: John Q
recommendations.overview: John Quincy Archibald is a father and husband whose son is diagnosed with an enlarged heart and then finds out he cannot receive a transplant because HMO insurance will not cover it. Therefore, he decides to take a hospital full of patients hostage u

recommendations.title: Hearts of Darkness: A Filmmaker's Apocalypse
recommendations.overview: A chronicle of the production problems — including bad weather, actors' health, war near the filming locations, and more — which plagued the filming of Apocalypse Now, increasing costs and nearly destroying the life and career of Francis Ford Coppola
recommendations.director: Fax Bahr, Eleanor Coppola, George Hickenlooper

recommendations.title: The Road
